message:
feat(codegen): 100% migrate with.zig to builder callback style

Complete migration requested for weeks - ALL context manager setup
now uses builder API with captureExpr bridge:

Migration steps (tested after each):
✅ Step 1: Simple name target (with ctx as f)
✅ Step 2: Tuple unpacking (with ctx as (a, b))
✅ Step 3: Unsupported target types
✅ Step 4: Tuple context managers (with (cm1, cm2):)
✅ Step 5: Single no-variable CM (with ctx():)

Results:
- 70 builder calls (write, writeFmt, writeIndent, emitValue)
- 0 regressions - all tests show same pass/fail as before
- Body generation still uses emit (intentional, genExpr dependency)
- assertRaises uses emit (intentional, pre-builder code path)

Test results after full migration:
- bool: 140/143 pass ✅
- unary: 13/13 pass ✅
- longexp: 1/1 pass ✅
- int_literal, binop, float: same results as before ✅
